notes.summary: A spice is any seed, fruit, root, bark, leaf or any other part of a plant used to give taste and colour to our food.
notes.importance: This matters because spices play a crucial role in cooking and can add flavor and nutritional value to our meals.
quick_facts: Spices are derived from various parts of plants
They are used to enhance the taste and color of food
Examples include seeds, fruits, roots, bark, and leaves

notes.summary: Jeera seeds can improve digestion and help cure sleeplessness when soaked in water overnight. They are a common spice found in many kitchens.
notes.importance: This matters because jeera seeds offer a natural remedy for digestive issues and insomnia, reducing the need for medication.
quick_facts: Jeera seeds can be soaked in water to improve digestion
They help cure sleeplessness when consumed overnight
Jeera is a common spice found in many kitchens worldwide

notes.concept_name: Benefits of Methi Seeds for Sugar Level and Weight Control
notes.summary: Methi seeds can help control sugar levels and body weight when soaked overnight and the water is consumed in the morning.
notes.importance: This matters because methi seeds offer a natural solution for managing blood sugar levels and weight, promoting overall health and wellness.
quick_facts: Methi seeds can be soaked overnight to control sugar levels
The seed water helps manage body weight when consumed in the morning
Methi is a natural remedy for various health issues
